candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A component under the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold'. The COGS total appears to already include it, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A component under the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold'. The COGS total appears to already include it, so adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: 'Cost of goods sold' is the selected COGS bucket, and the separate depreciation/amortization rows appear to be sub-components of that total alongside 'Other Cost of goods sold' and impairment lines.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling and administrative expenses
candidates.why: Although presented as a separate row, it appears to roll into the selected parent bucket 'Selling expenses' because together with amortization, impairment, and 'Other Selling expenses' it sums to the selected selling expense total. Therefore it is already embedded.

candidates.row_label: Amortization in Selling and administrative expenses
candidates.why: Although presented as a separate row, it appears to roll into the selected parent bucket 'Selling expenses' because together with depreciation, impairment, and 'Other Selling expenses' it sums to the selected selling expense total. Therefore it is already embedded.

variables.notes: No separate same-level SG&A D&A total should be added. The visible selling/admin D&A rows appear to be components of the already selected operating expense rows, especially 'Selling expenses'. No explicit R&D D&A row is present.
